reference: Hello, I have a daughter who is twenty-three years old and experiencing shortness of breath when running, mainly uphill. She is also experiencing headaches, loss of appetite, and a low-grade fever. She is an avid runner, running about seven to ten miles a day. She has had anemia in the past, and my question is: can she be suffering from anemia or stress-induced asthma?
text: hello i have a daughter who is 23 years old and experiencing shortness of breath when running mainly uphill she is also experiencing headaches loss of appetite and a low-grade fever she is an avid runner running about seven to ten miles a day she has had anemia in the past and my question is can she be suffering from anemia or stress-induced asthma
